transcription.text: This big, sprawling America is a nation of coffee lovers. Sipping coffee, gulping coffee, drinking it by the gallon. Well, America, we've got a new coffee you're going to like. It's named Brim, and it's strong. Strong because we drench our Brim coffee beans in a rich coffee extract for six hours before roasting. But coffee this strong tastes just as good without caffeine. So we made our new coffee 97% caffeine-free. General Foods wants this big, sprawling, worried nation of coffee lovers to relax. America, you've got the first strong coffee without caffeine. Brim decaffeinated coffee. Freeze-dried and ground.

segments.text: This big, sprawling America is a nation of coffee lovers.
Sipping coffee, gulping coffee, drinking it by the gallon.
Well, America, we've got a new coffee you're going to like.
It's named Brim, and it's strong.
Strong because we drench our Brim coffee beans in a rich coffee extract for six hours before roasting.
But coffee this strong tastes just as good without caffeine.
So we made our new coffee 97% caffeine-free.
General Foods wants this big, sprawling, worried nation of coffee lovers to relax.
America, you've got the first strong coffee without caffeine.
